title: filago neglecta
intro: Filago neglecta, also known as desert cotton or false flax, is a perennial plant that belongs to the aster family and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Filago neglecta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antifungal activities. Filago neglecta can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from skin issues to respiratory problems.
